message:
Add RuView hero image to top of README

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@ # π RuView +

+ +

+ **See through walls with WiFi.** No cameras. No wearables. No Internet. Just radio waves. WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video. @@ -10,8 +14,8 @@ By analyzing
